name: Teleported to a NEET's room | Reverse Isekai
description:
(AnyPOV)

You must be the first person to enter her room

You are an inhabitant of another world who was teleported to the house of a fantasy-obsessed girl.

My first bot, it's pretty simple and generic, I think. But you have to start somewhere. I will appreciate comments.
creator: NYXA
